localizations.title: Squeek and Sausage
localizations.hiddenObject_1: It seems as if something is stuck in this old VCR.
localizations.hiddenObject_3: You will only find four useful objects in the drawer.
localizations.hiddenObject_4: There's a mouse in the kitchen.
localizations.hiddenObject_5: Where do we usually hide keys?
localizations.code_1247: You open the cupboard and take the cheese that's hidden behind a cloud of flies.
localizations.code_2411: You press the button and Noside's evil device stops after releasing a few electrical flashes. Well done, you have saved the world! That's all folks!
localizations.code_3154: Noside's laboratory contains a huge screen showing a satellite image of the Earth, towards which a hundred missiles are pointing. How can you stop it?… Yes! Look at the ceiling!
localizations.code_3434: The door creaks open into a new room.
localizations.code_5555: The door creaks open into a new room.
localizations.code_5800: You press the button and Noside's evil device stops after releasing a few electrical flashes. Well done, you have saved the world! That's all folks!
localizations.code_5801: You press the button and Noside's evil device stops after releasing a few electrical flashes. Well done, you have saved the world! That's all folks!
localizations.code_5802: You press the button and Noside's evil device stops after releasing a few electrical flashes. Well done, you have saved the world! That's all folks!
localizations.code_5803: You press the button and Noside's evil device stops after releasing a few electrical flashes. Well done, you have saved the world! That's all folks!

localizations.code_5809: You press the button and Noside's evil device stops after releasing a few electrical flashes. Well done, you have saved the world! That's all folks!
localizations.code_7656: The drawer slides open silently. It's overflowing with papers and various documents.
localizations.code_6034: You press the button and Noside's evil device stops after releasing a few electrical flashes. Well done, you have saved the world! That's all folks!
localizations.code_5599: You press the button and Noside's evil device stops after releasing a few electrical flashes. Well done, you have saved the world! That's all folks!
localizations.code_8238: You press the button and Noside's evil device stops after releasing a few electrical flashes. Well done, you have saved the world! That's all folks!
localizations.code_5804: You press the button and Noside's evil device stops after releasing a few electrical flashes. Well done, you have saved the world! That's all folks!
localizations.hint_2: Noside has put his picture on the door. The code must be linked to an image of him...
localizations.hint_3: It is sometimes useful to look the key hole.
localizations.hint_4: Follow these instructions well: you need to put the maze together then add the mouse with the correct hole in order to win this game.
localizations.hint_5: You need a key. Where do we usually hide keys?
localizations.hint_6: A capsule that would send a horse to sleep… Or any other animal that would accept to swallow it.
localizations.hint_7: The door opens. Now you can throw things in the garden.
localizations.hint_9: You will only find four useful objects in this drawer.
localizations.hint_11: You must rewind the tape manually. So 18 will become…
localizations.hint_12: Where do we usually hide keys?
localizations.hint_14: You could always try and plant them… But without soil, they're useless!
localizations.hint_15: It's a maze for rodents: only one hole leads to the sausage. You just need to find the correct opening.
localizations.hint_18: You must rewind the tape manually. So 18 will become…
localizations.hint_20: There is a mouse in this hole. But how are you going to lure it out?
localizations.hint_21: It's a maze for rodents: only one hole leads to the sausage. You just need to find the correct opening.
localizations.hint_24: Water is life… You can even make sorbet.
localizations.hint_26: This mouse maze is quite complicated… You need to find a brave rodent to venture inside. Anyone up for it?
localizations.hint_31: Which shape might you actually need? And most of all… What for?
localizations.hint_32: Cheddar cheese… Which animal is traditionally crazy about cheese?
localizations.hint_36: Gears change direction, while belts keep the same direction. So, left or right?
localizations.hint_37: This tune is well-known… But why does each note have a number?
localizations.hint_38: If we told you that the correct hole is on this map, would you believe it?
localizations.hint_40_first: This cage makes you think of a code… With bars. Where do we usually find bar codes?
localizations.hint_40: Look for the answer on the Unlock! box.
localizations.hint_46: An ordinary key… Which opens a lock. No lock, no need for a key (and vice versa).
localizations.hint_49: By opening the door you see a dog that you're going to have to get rid of. The question is how.
localizations.hint_52: This mouse is so cute… Now you need to put it into the right opening in the maze.
localizations.hint_54: It's crazy how much this skull ice looks like a key.
localizations.hint_56: The shape of the pipes could help you. Link the arrows.
localizations.hint_57: There's a mouse in the kitchen.
localizations.hint_58: It's a shame that Noside is so evil… The soil in his garden seems so rich… Carrots and cabbages would love it.
localizations.hint_63: What trick has Noside's cook found so he can only get to the cheese at the exact moment that he needs it?
localizations.hint_72: Now you need to water all that.
localizations.hint_73: The cheddar must be added at a precise moment. Don't spoil this batch!
localizations.hint_77: This sausage would be quickly devoured by the dog… But don't you think that would be a bit too nice? What else could you do with it?
localizations.hint_78: The secret of a successful cake is in the cooking. We don't pay enough attention to the steps and the cooking times.
localizations.hint_81: The tape can now be read. What device could do it?
localizations.hint_83: This sausage could knock a hound out! You need to find a way of giving it to him.
localizations.hint_88_first: The flowers seem to dance to the rhyme of a mysterious tune. You will find one useful object in the drawer.
localizations.hint_88: The position of the blue flowers on the score will give you the code.
localizations.hint_89: The cooking started at 12:17 pm, so...
localizations.hint_91: Don't you see something stuck in this old VCR?
localizations.hint_92_first: The despicable Noside makes you want to grab the screen, turn it upside down and shake it… It may lead to the door code.
localizations.hint_92: When rotating the card, you see a 4 digit code for the door.
localizations.hint_95: Four rings of three colors… What mnemonic technique might Noside use to remember his code?
localizations.hint_98_first: The little flower that decorates the padlock is very cute. Unexpected, but cute.
localizations.hint_98: The position of the blue flowers on the score will give you the code.
localizations.hint_99: Do you really need our enlightenment to turn the light switch on? Just take the right card.
localizations.special_machine: This machine is special. To access it enter the sum of the 4 pieces which form it.
